title: Crash on DPI open array
body:
Thanks for taking the time to report this.

Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, ideally in test_regress format.)

Not a full one by the RTL change was `byte unsigned DataOutBuffer[TYPE_SIZE_BYTES-1:0];` to  `   byte unsigned DataOutBuffer[];`

I wouldn't be surprised if the latter wasn't supported, but it's a crash rather than an error so I'm reporting it.

May we assist you in trying to fix this yourself? Help please

Stack trace:
